history_draft.text: Patient presents with cough for [duration]. Cough described as [cough_character]. Sputum: [sputum_context]. Associated symptoms: [associated_symptoms]. Triggers/exposures: [triggers_or_exposures]. [Relevant negatives reviewed]. [Additional history].
